creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Hello again!

I have changed some entries in the “pkg-plist” as suggested by »make makeplist«:
* some “@dirrm” -> “@dirrmtry”
* “share/games/xboard/” -> “%%DATADIR%%/”
* “etc/xboard.conf.dist” -> “%%ETCDIR%%.conf.dist”
* “etc/xboard.conf” -> “%%ETCDIR%%.conf”

See new attachment 146262 “patch-v361946-to-newVersion_v2.diff” (replacing old attachment 146139 completely)

Sorry for the late change.
ru,
Kalten
